problem_text_cn: 1104 输油管直径$305\ \mathrm{mm}$，隔片开口面积为原面积的$1/5$，石油体积流量$Q_V=70\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{m^3/s}$，运动黏度$\eta/\rho=1.0\times10^{-4}\ \mathrm{m^2/s}$。判断石油经过隔片时是否为湍流。（临界雷诺数$Re_c\approx2000$）
problem_text_en: 1104 The diameter of an oil pipeline is $305\ \mathrm{mm}$, the opening area of the diaphragm is $1/5$ of the original area, the volume flow rate of oil is $Q_V=70\times10^{-3}\ \mathrm{m^3/s}$, and the kinematic viscosity is $\eta/\rho=1.0\times10^{-4}\ \mathrm{m^2/s}$. Determine whether the oil is in turbulent flow when passing through the diaphragm. (Critical Reynolds number $Re_c\approx2000$)
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】计算隔片处的流速$v=Q_V/S$，代入**雷诺数公式**$Re=\rho vr/\eta=vr/(\eta/\rho)$，将计算结果与临界雷诺数比较，$Re>Re_c$则为湍流。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Calculate the velocity at the diaphragm $v=Q_V/S$, substitute into the **Reynolds number formula** $Re=\rho vr/\eta=vr/(\eta/\rho)$, compare the calculated result with the critical Reynolds number. If $Re>Re_c$, it is turbulent flow.
problem_answer: 雷诺数$\boldsymbol{Re=3300>2000}$，石油经过隔片时**为湍流**
